categories.name: Calculus Sequence
categories.description: Choose one calculus sequence: MATH 19A+19B or MATH 20A+20B.

categories.name: Linear Algebra / Multivariate Calculus
categories.description: Choose one sequence: AM 10 + AM 30 or MATH 21 + MATH 23A.

categories.name: Lower Division CS Core
categories.description: All lower-division CS and ECE core courses are required.

categories.name: Upper Division CS Core
categories.description: All upper-division CS core courses are required.

categories.name: Physics Sequence
categories.description: Choose one physics combination. Associated labs are required for enrollment but do not count toward major requirements.

categories.name: Disciplinary Communication (DC)
categories.description: Complete one DC course. CSE 195 can satisfy DC OR an Upper Division Elective, but not both. DC courses cannot be used to satisfy Upper Division Electives (except CSE 195).
categories.note: DC courses cannot double-count as upper-division electives, except CSE 195 which can satisfy DC OR an elective but not both.

categories.name: Capstone / Comprehensive Requirement
categories.description: Complete one capstone course or senior thesis. The capstone course can count toward 1 of the 4 required upper division electives. Many capstone courses require additional prerequisites not already in major requirements.
categories.note: The capstone course can double-count as one of the 4 upper-division electives.

categories.name: Upper Division Electives
categories.description: Choose 4 (or more) upper-division CSE courses (100-189), or CSE 195, or courses from the Computational Media electives list. Up to 2 may be replaced by upper-division mathematics electives from the approved list. CSE 115A, CSE 185S, and CSE 185E cannot satisfy an elective requirement.
categories.note: Up to 2 of the 4 electives may be math courses. CSE 115A, CSE 185S, CSE 185E cannot be used here.
